title: Cabo Frio、RJ — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Cabo Frio、RJの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Cabo FrioはRJにある人口234,077の都市です。A historic coastal city in the Lagos Region, famous for its crystal-clear waters, white sand beaches, and colonial salt trade history.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
